description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named beta-release that triggers on push to the beta-release branch. Use a windows-latest job to set up .NET Core SDK 9.0.x, restore NuGet packages, and perform a series of build and publish steps. Configure Git to use LF line endings, then modify source code to inject build and release versions. Build and publish the app, create a changelog, zip the release, and upload it as a pre-release with a generated tag and name.
